basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering/Electrical and Electronics Engineering or equivalent with valid GATE, First Class M.E./M.Tech. in High Voltage or Power System Engineering with valid GATE (desirable)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): First Class B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electrical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, or an equivalent discipline, along with a valid GATE qualification. Desirable: First Class M.E./M.Tech. degree in High Voltage or Power System Engineering along with a valid GATE qualification.

salary_details.details: ₹37,000/- per month for the first two years (₹42,000/- per month for the third year)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_roorkee: First Class B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering/Electrical and Electronics Engineering or equivalent with valid GATE, First Class M.E./M.Tech. in High Voltage or Power System Engineering with valid GATE (desirable)

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): First Class B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electrical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, or an equivalent discipline, along with a valid GATE qualification. Desirable: First Class M.E./M.Tech. degree in High Voltage or Power System Engineering along with a valid GATE qualification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: ₹37,000/- per month for the first two years (₹42,000/- per month for the third year)

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 07 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First Class B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent with a valid GATE score. A First Class M.E./M.Tech. in High Voltage or Power System Engineering with GATE is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in this recruitment drive by IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years, which will increase to Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job. The position of Junior Research Fellow is typically for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
